info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API

This module contains APIs to read and modify Device Manager database objects such as device, adom, and group list. All API for this module are under the prefix /dvmdb/.

For additional commands such as adding or removing devices, please refer to the Device Manager Command daemon.

tags.name: /dvmdb/adom
tags.description: ADOM table, most attributes are read-only and can only be changed internally.

tags.name: /dvmdb/device
tags.description: Device table, most attributes are read-only and can only be changed internally. Refer to Device Manager Command module for API to add, delete, and manage devices.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workflow
tags.description: Read workflow session information. Read only.

tags.name: /dvmdb/workflow/wflog
tags.description: Read workflow session log. Read only.

common.filter.object.description: Filter the result according to a set of criteria.

common.range.object.description: Limit the number of output. For a range of [a, n], the output will contain n elements, starting from the ath matching result.

common.sort.object.description: Specify the sorting of the returned result.

mode.description:
ems - (Value no longer used as of 4.3)
provider - Global database.

foslic_inst_time.description: VM Meter first deployment time (in UNIX timestamp).

foslic_last_sync.description: VM Meter last synchronized time (in UNIX timestamp).

foslic_ram.description: VM Meter device RAM size (in MB).

foslic_utm.description:
VM Meter services
fw - Firewall
av - Anti-virus
ips - IPS
app - App control
url - Web filter
utm - Full UTM
fwb - FortiWeb

content.description: The full content of the script result log.

filter_build.description: The value will be ignored in add/set/update requests if filter_ostype is not set. It has no effect if target is "adom_database".

filter_device.description: Name or id of an existing device in the database. It has no effect if target is "adom_database".

filter_hostname.description: The value has no effect if target is "adom_database".

filter_ostype.description: The value has no effect if target is "adom_database".

filter_osver.description: The value will be ignored in add/set/update requests if filter_ostype is not set. It has no effect if target is "adom_database".

filter_platform.description: The value will be ignored in add/set/update requests if filter_ostype is not set. It has no effect if target is "adom_database".

filter_serial.description: The value has no effect if target is "adom_database".

modification_time.description: It is a read-only attribute indicating the time when the script was created or modified. The value will be ignored in add/set/update requests.

datetime.description:
Indicates the date and time of the schedule. It should follow the following format for each scheduling type:
  • onetime: "YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss"
  • daily: "hh:mm"
  • weekly: "hh:mm"
  • monthly: "DD hh:mm"

device.description: Name or id of an existing device in the database.

run_on_db.description: Indicates if the scheduled script should be executed on device database. It should always be disable for tcl scripts.

seq.description: Log sequence, with 1 being assigned to the latest result.

params.dvmdb.get.obj.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the object will be returned.
object member - Return a list of object members along with other attributes.
chksum - Return the check-sum value instead of attributes.

params.dvmdb.get.table.option.opts.description:
Set fetch option for the request. If no option is specified, by default the attributes of the objects will be returned.
count - Return the number of matching entries instead of the actual entry data.
object member - Return a list of object members along with other attributes.
syntax - Return the attribute syntax of a table or an object, instead of the actual entry data. All filter parameters will be ignored.

expand member.description: Fetch all or selected attributes of object members.

fields.description: Limit the output by returning only the attributes specified in the string array. If none specified, all attributes will be returned.

loadsub.description: Enable or disable the return of any sub-objects. If not specified, the default is to return all sub-objects.

meta fields.description: Specify the meta field attributes to be returned in the result. If none specified, no meta field attribute will be returned.
